stmt: ∀ {Γ : List Tp} {A : Tp}, (Γ ⇒ A) → tp_degree A ≤ list_degree Γ
∀ {s : String} {A : Tp}, ([# s] ⇒ A) → ∃ Δ : List Tp, Δ ⇒ # s ∧ A = (# s ⧸ foldl Tp.ldiv (# s) Δ) ∨ A = (foldr Tp.rdiv (# s) Δ)
∀ {Γ : List Tp} {A : Tp}, (Γ ⇒ A) → atom_count A ≤ atom_count_list Γ
∀ {Γ : List Tp} {A : Tp} {t : String}, (Γ ⇒ A) → occurs_atom t A → ∃ B ∈ Γ, occurs_atom t B
Prove exact completeness of the support closure by showing `∀ (Γ : List Tp) (A : Tp), SupportClosure Γ A ↔ (Γ ⇒ A)`.
